step_rationale: AF/stroke variant; DNA methylation in MI; mechanism unclear.
mechanism: ZFHX3 genetic variants modulate DNA methylation and AF/stroke risk; possible indirect atherosclerotic-inflammation pathway.

references.title: Epigenome-wide association of myocardial infarction with DNA methylation sites at loci related to cardiovascular disease.
Commentary on a GWAS: HDAC9 and the risk for ischaemic stroke.
